DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO PROVIDE DEPOSITION DATES FOR NON-PARTY DEPOSITIONS IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS FURTHER VERIFICATION THAT ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED AND A REPRESENTATION THAT A DILIGENT SEARCH HAS BEEN MADE AND A STATEMENT OF COMPLIANCE AS SET FORTH IN C.C.P. SECTION 2031.230. FURTHER VERIFICATION SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COUNSEL SHALL MEET AND CONFER TO SET DATES FOR DEPOSITIONS. THERE IS NO BASIS FOR A MOTION AT THIS TIME. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
PATRICK C. MULLIN, ESQ. for defendant and moving party: WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS, INC.
SUSAN RUBENSTEIN, ESQ. for plaintiff and opposing party: NELSON DELEON FERNANDEZ.

THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS, INC.'S Motion For Sanctions For The Spoliation Of Evidence And Request For Monetary Sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Set For Trial On Oct-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-17-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 604

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltf To Respond To Deft'S Req. For Production Of Documents And To Provide Depositions And Req. For Sanctions, Fees And Costs Against Pltf And Pltf'S Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendant's Request For Production Of Documents And To Provide Deposition Dates For Non-Party Depositions is granted as it seeks further verification that all responsive documents have been produced and a representation that a diligent search has been made and a statement of compliance as set forth in C.C.P. Section 2031.230. Further verification shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. Counsel shall meet and confer to set dates for depositions. There is no basis for a motion at this time. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
